props.name: feedbackUrl
props.description: URL to a feedback page displayed when provided.

props.name: feedbackUrlTarget
props.description: Sets the target attribute for the feedback URL link.

props.name: headerUrlTarget
props.description: Sets the target attribute for the header link.

props.name: maxContentWidth
props.description: Maximum width of the content area.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: type
props.description: The service type which determines the badge style. "live" shows official government site text, "alpha" and "beta" show development stage badges.

props.name: version
props.description: App or service version displayed on the right side of the header.

events.name: onFeedbackClick
events.description: Callback fired when the feedback link is clicked, enables custom feedback handling.

events.name: onFeedbackClick
events.description: Emits when the feedback link is clicked.

props.name: feedbackurl
props.description: Url to feedback page that will be displayed when provided.

props.name: feedbackurltarget
props.description: For internal feedback urls sets target=

props.name: hasfeedbackhandler
props.description: When true, enables a custom feedback click handler via the _feedbackClick event instead of navigating to feedbackurl.

props.name: headerurltarget
props.description: Sets the target attribute for the header link.

props.name: maxcontentwidth
props.description: Maximum width of the content area

props.name: testid
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: type
props.description: The service type which determines the badge style. "live" shows official government site text, "alpha" and "beta" show development stage badges.

props.name: version
props.description: App or service version displayed on the right side of the header.
